_comment: Enterprise-grade validation rule templates covering every major data quality edge case. Copy, rename, and adjust for each pipeline/table. rule_type maps to SQL templates in table_validator.py. ZSCORE_VOLUME and SCHEMA_DRIFT are meta-types handled by the agent analyzer.

validation_rules._description: Null rate checks — any column that must never be null
validation_rules.constraint_description: Primary key must never be NULL

validation_rules._description: Blank / empty-string rate check — column must not be empty string
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_name must not be blank or whitespace-only

validation_rules._description: Completeness rate — at least 95% of rows must have a value
validation_rules.constraint_description: At least 95% of members must have an email address
validation_rules._agent_hint: Compare failed_count/total_row_count ratio — flag only if > 0.05

validation_rules._description: Email format — regex pattern validation
validation_rules.constraint_description: Email must match RFC-5322 simplified pattern

validation_rules._description: Phone number format — 10 digits, optionally formatted
validation_rules.constraint_description: Phone number must be 10 digits (optionally with dashes/parens)

validation_rules._description: US ZIP code format
validation_rules.constraint_description: ZIP must be 5-digit or ZIP+4 format

validation_rules._description: Date column must not contain impossible dates or epoch/default dates
validation_rules.constraint_description: DOB must be between 1900-01-01 and today, not the Unix epoch default
validation_rules.condition: date_of_birth < DATE '1900-01-01' OR date_of_birth > current_date OR date_of_birth = DATE '1970-01-01'

validation_rules._description: Future-date guard — load_timestamp must not be in the future
validation_rules.constraint_description: load_timestamp must not be more than 1 hour in the future

validation_rules._description: Categorical value set — only allowed enum values
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_status must be one of: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED, PENDING

validation_rules._description: Boolean representation consistency — must be 0/1 not Y/N or true/false mixed
validation_rules.constraint_description: is_primary_member must be 0 or 1 only
validation_rules.condition: is_primary_member NOT IN ('0','1') AND is_primary_member IS NOT NULL

validation_rules._description: String length bounds — excessive length signals data corruption
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_name length must be between 2 and 150 characters

validation_rules._description: Encoding / special character detection — control characters or null bytes
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_name must not contain control characters (ASCII < 32)

validation_rules._description: Leading/trailing whitespace — normalisation issue from upstream
validation_rules.constraint_description: club_id must not have leading or trailing whitespace

validation_rules._description: Case consistency — plan_code must always be uppercase
validation_rules.constraint_description: plan_code must be fully uppercase

validation_rules._description: Numeric precision — premium_amount must be non-negative and have at most 2 decimal places
validation_rules.constraint_description: premium_amount must be >= 0

validation_rules._description: Numeric range — age must be between 0 and 120
validation_rules.constraint_description: Age must be between 0 and 120

validation_rules._description: Negative quantity guard
validation_rules.constraint_description: quantity must be between 1 and 10000

validation_rules._description: Primary key uniqueness
validation_rules.constraint_description: membership_number must be unique across all rows

validation_rules._description: Composite key uniqueness — (club_id, policy_number) must be unique
validation_rules.constraint_description: (club_id, policy_number) must form a unique key
validation_rules.condition: (club_id, policy_number) IN (SELECT club_id, policy_number FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl GROUP BY club_id, policy_number HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

validation_rules._description: Foreign-key integrity — club_id must exist in the reference clubs table
validation_rules.constraint_description: club_id must exist in reference_db.dim_clubs

validation_rules._description: Orphaned child record — product detail must have a parent member record
validation_rules.constraint_description: Every mrd_mbr_prd_dtl row must have a matching membership_number in mrd_mbr_info
validation_rules.condition: membership_number NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT membership_number FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info)

validation_rules._description: Data freshness — table must have been loaded within the last 26 hours
validation_rules.constraint_description: Latest load_timestamp must be within the last 26 hours

validation_rules._description: Late-arriving facts — transaction date should not be more than 7 days old
validation_rules.constraint_description: transaction_date must be within the last 7 days

validation_rules._description: Absolute row count minimum — table must have loaded at least N rows today
validation_rules.constraint_description: At least 1000 transaction rows expected per daily load
validation_rules._agent_hint: If failure_timestamp is a US major holiday, classify as FALSE_POSITIVE and consult holiday_calendar.json

validation_rules._description: Z-score per-club volume anomaly — today's count must be within 3σ of the 60-day rolling average
validation_rules.constraint_description: Each club's daily record count must be within 3 standard deviations of its 60-day rolling average
validation_rules.condition:
club_id IN (
  SELECT club_id
  FROM (
    SELECT
      club_id,
      today_cnt,
      hist_avg,
      hist_stddev,
      CASE WHEN hist_stddev > 0 THEN ABS(today_cnt - hist_avg) / hist_stddev ELSE 0 END AS z_score
    FROM (
      SELECT
        t.club_id,
        t.today_cnt,
        h.hist_avg,
        h.hist_stddev
      FROM (
        SELECT club_id, COUNT(*) AS today_cnt
        FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_transactions
        WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date
        GROUP BY club_id
      ) t
      JOIN (
        SELECT club_id,
               AVG(daily_cnt) AS hist_avg,
               STDDEV(daily_cnt) AS hist_stddev
        FROM (
          SELECT club_id, cast(load_timestamp AS date) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS daily_cnt
          FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_transactions
          WHERE load_timestamp >= date_add('day', -60, current_timestamp)
            AND cast(load_timestamp AS date) < current_date
          GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        GROUP BY club_id
      ) h ON t.club_id = h.club_id
    )
  )
  WHERE z_score > 3
)
validation_rules._agent_hint: Check failure_timestamp against holiday_calendar.json. Post-holiday surge is expected — classify as FALSE_POSITIVE. Missing club entirely (count near zero) is TRUE_FAILURE.

validation_rules._description: Double-load guard — row count must not exceed 150% of yesterday's count (dedup/re-trigger)
validation_rules.constraint_description: Today's total count must not exceed 150% of yesterday's count

validation_rules._description: Weekend drop check — Saturday/Sunday volume should be 40-70% of weekday average
validation_rules.constraint_description: Weekend volume should be between 30% and 80% of weekday baseline
validation_rules.condition:
day_of_week(current_date) IN (1,7) AND (
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_transactions WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date
) < 0.3 * (
  SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM (
    SELECT cast(load_timestamp AS date) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_transactions
    WHERE load_timestamp >= date_add('day',-30,current_timestamp)
      AND day_of_week(cast(load_timestamp AS date)) NOT IN (1,7)
    GROUP BY 1
  )
)
validation_rules._agent_hint: If today is Saturday or Sunday, a lower volume is expected. FALSE_POSITIVE unless count is near zero.

validation_rules._description: Start date must be before end date
validation_rules.constraint_description: policy_start_date must be earlier than policy_end_date

validation_rules._description: Status transition guard — CANCELLED member must not revert to ACTIVE without re-enrollment
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_status cannot change from CANCELLED directly to ACTIVE (must pass through PENDING)
validation_rules.condition:
member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND membership_number IN (
  SELECT membership_number FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info_history
  WHERE member_status = 'CANCELLED'
    AND cast(effective_date AS date) = current_date - INTERVAL '1' DAY
)

validation_rules._description: Sum integrity — total_premium in summary must equal sum of premium in detail
validation_rules.constraint_description: Sum of curated_db.mrd_mbr_summary.total_premium must equal sum of landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl.premium_amount
validation_rules.condition:
ABS(
  (SELECT SUM(total_premium) FROM curated_db.mrd_mbr_summary WHERE cast(update_date AS date) = current_date)
  -
  (SELECT SUM(premium_amount) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date)
) > 0.01

validation_rules._description: Landing → Curated row count must match within 1% (no drop in medallion transform)
validation_rules.constraint_description: Row count in curated must be within 1% of landing count loaded today
validation_rules.condition:
ABS(
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curated_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(update_date AS date) = current_date)
  -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date)
) * 1.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date), 0) > 0.01

validation_rules._description: Silver → Gold aggregation consistency — member count in gold must equal distinct members in silver
validation_rules.constraint_description: Count of distinct active members in gold must match silver

validation_rules._description: SSN exposure — must not appear unmasked in any column
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_notes must not contain a raw 9-digit SSN pattern

validation_rules._description: Credit card number exposure guard in free-text fields
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_notes must not contain a 16-digit card number

validation_rules._description: Password / secret field must not appear in plaintext
validation_rules.constraint_description: member_notes must not contain password-like patterns

validation_rules._description: Column count must match expected schema — detects added or dropped columns
validation_rules.constraint_description: mrd_mbr_info must have exactly 28 columns
validation_rules.condition: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'landing_db' AND table_name = 'mrd_mbr_info') <> 28
validation_rules._agent_hint: If count differs, list new/missing columns vs expected schema and classify as TRUE_FAILURE — schema drift is always actionable.

validation_rules._description: Data type sanity — club_id must be VARCHAR not accidentally cast to numeric
validation_rules.constraint_description: club_id must have data_type = varchar
validation_rules.condition: (SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='landing_db' AND table_name='mrd_mbr_info' AND column_name='club_id') NOT LIKE '%char%'

validation_rules._description: Revenue calculation consistency
validation_rules.constraint_description: total_revenue must equal quantity * unit_price within 1 cent

validation_rules._description: Club-state mapping — club_id prefix must match the state code
validation_rules.constraint_description: club_id prefix (first 2 chars) must match state_code

validation_rules._description: Age must match date_of_birth calculation
validation_rules.constraint_description: Stored age must match calculated age from date_of_birth within 1 year

validation_rules._description: Cancelled member must have a cancellation_date
validation_rules.constraint_description: CANCELLED members must have a non-null cancellation_date

validation_rules._description: IQR-based outlier — outlier records with extreme values (alternative to Z-score for skewed distributions)
validation_rules.constraint_description: premium_amount must not be more than 3x IQR above Q3 (Tukey fence)
validation_rules.condition:
premium_amount > (
  SELECT approx_percentile(premium_amount, 0.75) + 3.0 *
    (approx_percentile(premium_amount, 0.75) - approx_percentile(premium_amount, 0.25))
  FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl
  WHERE cast(load_timestamp AS date) = current_date
)
validation_rules._agent_hint: IQR fence anomaly. Check if value is a data-entry error or a legitimate large-premium member. Compare with historical max for same club.

validation_rules._description: Cardinality guard — number of distinct clubs in today's load must not drop by more than 10%
validation_rules.constraint_description: Distinct club_id count today must be at least 90% of yesterday's count
validation_rules._agent_hint: Missing clubs could be: (1) clubs with no transactions on a holiday — FALSE_POSITIVE; (2) file delivery failure for specific clubs — TRUE_FAILURE. Cross-reference with holiday_calendar and per-club historical patterns.
